content.description: Specifies the main content or data associated with the resource, cannot be null

description.description: Provides a brief overview or explanation for the resource, optional field

name.description: Defines the name of the resource, must be specified and cannot be null

skip_destroy.description: Indicates whether the resource should bypass the destruction process during a Terraform destroy operation, optional field

tags.description: Allows assignment of custom metadata or labels to the resource, optional field and supports key-value pairs

type.description: Specifies the resource type or category, optional field
